'''thanate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:azimuthally|azimuthally]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-n-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:azimuthally|azimuthally]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| thanate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:thanate|thanate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:thanatesher|thanatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thanatesherĂ«m|thanatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:thanatero|thanatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:thanateshĂ«|thanateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thanateshĂ«m|thanateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokithanatero|gokithanatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokithanateshĂ«|gokithanateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithanateshĂ«m|gokithanateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gothanankerom|gothanankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothanankeshĂ«|gothanankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothanankeshĂ«m|gothanankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gothanankeya|gothanankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:thanaterom|thanaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thanatemu|thanatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:thanateya|thanateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokithanaterom|gokithanaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithanatemu|gokithanatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokithanateya|gokithanateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:thananate|thananate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:thananatesher|thananatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thananatesherĂ«m|thananatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:thananatero|thananatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:thananateshĂ«|thananateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thananateshĂ«m|thananateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokithananatero|gokithananatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokithananateshĂ«|gokithananateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithananateshĂ«m|gokithananateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gothananankerom|gothananankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothananankeshĂ«|gothananankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothananankeshĂ«m|gothananankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gothananankeya|gothananankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:thananaterom|thananaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thananatemu|thananatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:thananateya|thananateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokithananaterom|gokithananaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithananatemu|gokithananatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokithananateya|gokithananateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:thĂŠnĂŠte|thĂŠnĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:thĂŠnĂŠtesher|thĂŠnĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thĂŠnĂŠtesherĂ«m|thĂŠnĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:thĂŠnĂŠtero|thĂŠnĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:thĂŠnĂŠteshĂ«|thĂŠnĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thĂŠnĂŠteshĂ«m|thĂŠnĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokithĂŠnĂŠtero|gokithĂŠnĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokithĂŠnĂŠteshĂ«|gokithĂŠnĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithĂŠnĂŠteshĂ«m|gokithĂŠnĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gothĂŠnĂŠnkerom|gothĂŠnĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothĂŠnĂŠnkeshĂ«|gothĂŠnĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothĂŠnĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gothĂŠnĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gothĂŠnĂŠnkeya|gothĂŠnĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:thĂŠnĂŠterom|thĂŠnĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thĂŠnĂŠtemu|thĂŠnĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:thĂŠnĂŠteya|thĂŠnĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokithĂŠnĂŠterom|gokithĂŠnĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithĂŠnĂŠtemu|gokithĂŠnĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokithĂŠnĂŠteya|gokithĂŠnĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:thafnafte|thafnafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:thafnaftesher|thafnaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thafnaftesherĂ«m|thafnaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:thafnaftero|thafnaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:thafnafteshĂ«|thafnafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thafnafteshĂ«m|thafnafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokithafnaftero|gokithafnaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokithafnafteshĂ«|gokithafnafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithafnafteshĂ«m|gokithafnafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gothafnafnkerom|gothafnafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothafnafnkeshĂ«|gothafnafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothafnafnkeshĂ«m|gothafnafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gothafnafnkeya|gothafnafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:thafnafterom|thafnafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thafnaftemu|thafnaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:thafnafteya|thafnafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokithafnafterom|gokithafnafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithafnaftemu|gokithafnaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokithafnafteya|gokithafnafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
